# iot corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === IoT / AWS and Azure ===
# expect: AWS IoT Core ATS Endpoint
# expect: Azure IoT Hub Device Connection String
# expect: Azure IoT Hub X.509 Connection String
# expect: Azure DPS Symmetric Key
a1b2c3d4e5f6g7-ats.iot.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com
HostName=myhub.azure-devices.net;DeviceId=mydevice;SharedAccessKey=QUJDREVGR0hJSktMTU5PUFFSU1RVVldYWVowMTIzNDU2
HostName=myhub.azure-devices.net;DeviceId=mydevice;x509=true
symmetricKey=cGFzc3dvcmRwYXNzd29yZHBhc3N3b3JkcGFzc3dvcmQ=

# === IoT / TTN and LoRaWAN ===
# expect: The Things Stack API Key
# expect: LoRaWAN AppKey
NNSXS.ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ234567ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRST.ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ234567ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRST
AppKey=2B7E151628AED2A6ABF7158809CF4F3C

# === IoT / Balena and Adafruit ===
# expect: Balena Cloud Device API Key
# expect: Adafruit IO Key
deviceApiKey=006e82c27eabcd579ce310687b937cd5
aio_AbCd1234EfGh5678IjKl9012MnOp

# === IoT / Tuya ===
# expect: Tuya Cloud Access ID
# expect: Tuya Cloud Access Secret
# expect: Tuya Device Local Key
tuya_access_id=gv7tunzhwf3xs4qkkc8x
tuya_access_secret=89aacf4e5c4f4e9b9b1234567890abcd
local_key=3a9b50126fe47312

# === IoT / RTSP camera URLs ===
# expect: RTSP Credentials URL (Hikvision)
# expect: RTSP Credentials URL (Dahua)
# expect: RTSP Credentials URL (generic)
rtsp://admin:hunter2@192.168.1.100:554/Streaming/Channels/101
rtsp://admin:hunter2@192.168.1.100:554/cam/realmonitor?channel=1&subtype=0
rtsp://user:pass@10.0.0.5:554/live
